creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Please have a look at ports/180338. The problem is well known, but
still pending due to the fact the patch I provided as well as the
update of the hashes has not been committed yet.

Temporarily fix:

type "make distclean ; make makesum" in the port's folder to receive
the newest files AND create the hash.

Regards,
Oliver
